summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.List; import java.util.Set; import org.json.JSONArray; import org.json.JSONObject; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.TaskContext; public class DarwinDiversityAnalyzer { public List<JSONObject> analyze(List<JSONObject> variants, TaskContext context) { if (variants.size() < 2) return variants; List<JSONObject> unique = new ArrayList<>(); for (JSONObject v : variants) { if (isUnique(v, unique)) { unique.add(v); } else { context.log("[DIVERSITY] Dropping redundant trajectory: " + v.optString("strategy")); } } return unique;
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
